basic_details.job_title: Bharathiar University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bharathiar University is recruiting 01 Project Associate for an ANRF-funded project in the Department of Botany. Candidates with Ph.D./M.Phil./M.Sc. in Life Sciences and national level exam qualification can apply.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates by email

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D./M.Phil./M.Sc. in Botany / Biotechnology / Microbiology / Allied Life Sciences / Biological Sciences + Qualification in national level examinations (CSIR/ICAR/UGC/ICMR/DBT etc.)

selection_process: Selection will be based on scrutiny of resumes followed by Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview.
how_to_apply: Interested candidates who fulfill the qualifications should send their resume to [email protected] on or before 22 July 2026. Shortlisted candidates will be intimated for the interview by email.
important_instructions: The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be given for attending the interview. The selected candidate will work in collaboration with Agharkar Research Institute, Pune. The date of interview will be intimated by email only.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Bharathiar University Project Associate Official Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Bharathiar University Project Associate Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Applications are invited for the position of Project Associate to work in the ANRF project at Bharathiar University in collaboration with Agharkar Research Institute, Pune. The selected candidate will work on endolichenic fungi, polyphasic taxonomy, and bioprospecting for breast cancer therapeutics. Download Bharathiar University Project Associate Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Bharathiar University is recruiting 01 Project Associate for an ANRF-funded project in the Department of Botany. Candidates with Ph.D./M.Phil./M.Sc. in Life Sciences and national level exam qualification can apply.

rows.bharathiar_university_coimbatore: Decoding the dark taxa in symbiosis; exploring the endolichenic fungi through polyphasic taxonomy and harnessing their bioprospecting potential for breast cancer therapeutics

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates by email

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026
Bharathiar University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Ph.D./M.Phil./M.Sc. in Botany / Biotechnology / Microbiology / Allied Life Sciences / Biological Sciences + Qualification in national level examinations (CSIR/ICAR/UGC/ICMR/DBT etc.)
Research experience in relevant fields, good publications in peer-reviewed journals, knowledge in extraction, screening and evaluating bioactive compounds for breast cancer therapeutics

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on scrutiny of resumes followed by Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Bharathiar University Project Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates who fulfill the qualifications should send their resume to [email protected] on or before 22 July 2026. Shortlisted candidates will be intimated for the interview by email.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Bharathiar University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be given for attending the interview. The selected candidate will work in collaboration with Agharkar Research Institute, Pune. The date of interview will be intimated by email only.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Bharathiar University Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for sending resume is 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many Project Associate vacancies are available at Bharathiar University?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Project Associate.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Associate at Bharathiar University?
faq.answer: Monthly pay is Rs. 37,000 + HRA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for Bharathiar University Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Ph.D./M.Phil./M.Sc. in Botany/Biotechnology/Microbiology or Allied Life Sciences + national level exam qualification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the project title for the ANRF position at Bharathiar University?
faq.answer: ‘Decoding the dark taxa in symbiosis; exploring the endolichenic fungi through polyphasic taxonomy and harnessing their bioprospecting potential for breast cancer therapeutics’.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for Bharathiar University Project Associate vacancy?
faq.answer: Send your resume to [email protected] on or before 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The duration is three years.

faq.question: Q8. Is prior research experience required for Bharathiar University Project Associate?
faq.answer: Yes, research experience in relevant fields with good publications is desirable.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Project Associate position at Bharathiar University permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a temporary project position.

faq.question: Q10. With which institute is the Bharathiar University project collaborating?
faq.answer: Agharkar Research Institute, Pune.
